title: Spinner
description: Small loading indicator for async operations. Should not be the only indicator; use text where helpful.

states.name: reduced-motion
effects: Use minimal animation or a static indicator.

aria: If spinner is purely decorative, set aria-hidden="true".
If it represents loading, add an accessible label and set aria-busy="true" on the relevant container.

must: Spinner must not be the only way to convey progress for long tasks (use progress).
must_not: Do not block interactions globally for small async tasks.

token_usage.notes: Use UI motion token; reduce for prefers-reduced-motion.
